content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
Thruster (1St Rep From Floor)
10-8-6-4-2

Metcon:
20:00 Min AMRAP:
18 1DB Box Step Overs #1x22.5/15kg
15/12 Cals Row
12 1DB Alt. Devil's Press

CrossFit Endurance
Part A:
For Time:
1000-800-400-200m Run
*30 Sit-Ups
20 Hand Release Push Ups
10 K2E After Each Set

Part B:
02:00Min On\02:00 Min Off x 4 Rounds: (AMRAP)
15 Empty Barbell Thrusters #20/15kg
5 Burpee Pull Ups
